arts.ttl: Nations League | Italy v Belgium: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Stadio Olimpico in Rome is set to host a crucial UEFA Nations League clash as Group A2 leaders Italy welcome Belgium on Thursday night. Both sides will be looking to stake their claim for a spot in the quarter-finals of the competition. Luciano Spalletti’s Italy side have made a dream start to their Nations League campaign, sitting pretty at the top of the group with maximum points from their opening two matches. The Azzurri kicked things off with a stunning 3-1 victory over France in Paris, before following it up with a hard-fought 2-1 win against Israel. arts.ttl: Calafiori opens up on Italy’s upcoming challenge and Arsenal move
arts.sum: Riccardo Calafiori, the Arsenal defender and former Juventus target, has shared his thoughts on the Italian national team’s upcoming fixtures and his recent career developments. The young defender reflected on the whirlwind changes in his life, stating, “In the last three or four months, my career and life have changed quite a bit, without warning. arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Garnacho wants Barcelona move; De Bruyne close to Man City exit
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel has made it clear he wants Man Utd to sign Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo if he is chosen to replace Ten Hag as manager. Man Utd are preparing a bid of €50m (£41.9m) to sign Aston Villa centre-back Pau Torres in 2025.

arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Injury update: Return timelines for Scamacca, Brescianini, and Scalvini
arts.sum: Atalanta continue to face a defensive crisis, as evidenced in their recent Serie A match against Genoa where they had to adapt by moving de Roon to the backline. This adjustment, while necessary, deprives the midfield of a crucial filter. Despite manager Gasperini’s preference to maintain the team’s momentum, the international break comes at an opportune time for recovering key defensive players. Calciomercato report how In defence, team leader Djimsiti is nursing a left hip issue, while Kossounou is dealing with a muscle problem in his left thigh.
